settings.title: API Key Settings
settings.description: Configure your OpenRouter and fal.ai API keys to use Open Film.
settings.warning: ⚠️ API keys are stored in your browser's localStorage. Only use this on your local machine. Never deploy to a public server.
settings.securityWarning: API keys are stored locally in your browser. Do not deploy this app to a public server.
settings.persistFalUploadsHint: Keep uploaded images on fal.ai permanently. Off by default — uploads expire after ~7 days.
settings.localStorageHint: Generated images, videos, and chat history are automatically saved to the local-data/ folder in the project directory, organized by session.

videoAgent.title: Open Film
videoAgent.subtitle: AI Video Creation Agent
videoAgent.resetDescription: Are you sure? All conversations and storyboard data will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
videoAgent.emptyPrompt: Describe your video idea in the chat panel
videoAgent.chatWelcome: Tell me what video you want to create
videoAgent.deleteShotConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this shot? This cannot be undone.
videoAgent.deleteFrameConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this frame image? This cannot be undone.
videoAgent.confirmGeneration: The following operations will cost API credits. Continue?
videoAgent.globalReferencesHint: Visual anchors for character, style, and scene consistency across all shots
videoAgent.removeReferenceDesc: Remove this reference image? Already-generated content won't be affected.
videoAgent.configRequired: Please configure your API keys first

export.title: Trim & Export
export.noCompletedShots: No completed video shots to export

toast.waitForLoad: Please wait for videos to load
toast.waitVideoLoad: Please wait for video to load
